name: BASANITE, INC.
summary: Basanite, Inc., through its subsidiary Basanite Industries, LLC, manufactures green, sustainable, non-corrosive composite products for concrete reinforcement in the construction industry. Its core product is BasaFlex, a basalt fiber reinforced polymer (BFRP) rebar marketed as a corrosion-proof, lightweight alternative to steel. Other products include BasaMix (chopped basalt fibers) and BasaMesh (basalt geogrid mesh rolls). The company operates from South Florida and is transitioning facilities to Ohio, facing going-concern uncertainties due to limited funding.

products.name: BasaFlex
products.description: Basalt fiber reinforced polymer (BFRP) rebar; corrosion-proof, lightweight, non-conductive alternative to traditional steel rebar for concrete reinforcement.

products.name: BasaMix
products.description: Fine denier basalt fibers available in various chopped sizes for use in concrete reinforcement applications.

products.name: BasaMesh
products.description: Basalt geogrid mesh rolls intended to replace welded wire mesh made of steel in construction applications.
